---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The use case**

What you're trying to do. Explain the problem first — the proposed UI second.

**Proposed behaviour**

How you'd expect BytecodeLens to solve it.

**Alternatives you've considered**

Workarounds, other tools, or "I could just do X manually".

**Additional context**

Screenshots, mockups, or links to how other tools handle it.
